title: Session 17 pipeline parameters (Exercise 3 solution)
description: Word count pipeline — extended schema with custom validation rules.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

outdir.description: The output directory where results will be saved.

processing_options.title: Processing options
processing_options.description: Options that control how the pipeline processes data.

suffix.errorMessage: suffix may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
suffix.description: Suffix appended to the output summary filename.

min_word_length.errorMessage: min_word_length must be an integer between 1 and 20.
min_word_length.description: Minimum word length to include in counts.

condition_filter.errorMessage: condition_filter must be one of: all, tumor, normal.
condition_filter.description: Process only samples matching this condition.

email.description: Email address to notify on pipeline completion.
email.help_text: Set this to receive an email when the pipeline finishes. Requires your institution's mail server to be configured.
